hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Matiana Estudiante in Zacatecas offers a 5-star hotel experience with a sun terrace and free WiFi. Guests enjoy air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and parquet floors.
Comfortable Amenities: The hotel features a shared kitchen, daily housekeeping, and a tour desk. Additional amenities include a balcony, terrace, and work desk.
Dining Options: A paid airport shuttle service and concierge service are available. Breakfast is served in-room with American options including pancakes, cheese, and fruits.
Prime Location: Located in the city centre, the hotel is a short walk from El Eden Mine (6 minutes), Bicentennial Park (less than 1 km), and Zacatecas Cathedral (6 minutes). General Leobardo C. Ruiz International Airport is 32 km away.

hotels.description_en:
Located in the heart of Zacatecas, named a UNESCO World Heritage Site, this luxury hotel is within walking distance to many of the city's attractions and offers exceptional accommodations and services.
The Emporio Zacatecas is ideally situated only a short distance from the cultural, recreational and business areas of the city. Discover the Eden Mine, ride the cable car up Bufa Mountain or visit one of several nearby museums.
Guests at the Zacatecas Emporio can also enjoy a number of first-class amenities and facilities. Arrange tours and excursions with the concierge staff, browse for gifts in the on-site shop, or relax in the hotel's sauna.
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.8 for a two-person trip.
